articles.title: Iran, US-Israel war LIVE updates: Brent crude tumbles to $83/bbl after Trump says Iran deal reached, Hormuz ‘permanently toll free’
articles.description: Iran, US-Israel war LIVE updates: The US and Iran agreed to a cease-fire ending months of conflict, with a formal signing set for Geneva. The deal halts military operations and eases tensions, impacting oil prices and global markets.

articles.title: Oil Prices Fall as US and Iran Reach Agreement and Trump Lifts Blockade on Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Oil prices fell sharply on Sunday after President Trump announced a peace agreement with Iran and ordered the immediate lifting of the US naval blockade, with Brent crude dropping 3.9% to $84 a barrel and US crude falling 4.8% to around $81. , Business, Times Now

articles.title: Shares Jump, Oil Skids in Asia on News of Gulf Deal
articles.description: Share markets surged in Asia on Monday while the dollar slipped and oil prices slid as news the United States had agreed to a peace deal with Iran boosted risk sentiment and promised to ease inflationary pressures globally.

articles.title: Gas prices won’t drop anytime soon despite Strait of Hormuz reopening, EIA says
articles.description: Ships will soon be sailing through the Strait of Hormuz again, and drivers across the country are all wondering when gas prices may return to where they were before the conflict with Iran began.

articles.title: Crude oil prices fall nearly 5% after Trump announces Iran deal, Hormuz reopening
articles.description: Brent crude fell over 3.5% in the initial trades to fall below the mark of $85 a barrel, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) or the US crude variant, fell as much as 5% and at one point was on the verge of breaking below the mark of $80 a barrel.
